justification: The diff correctly updates Java version to 21, migrates javax.* to jakarta.* namespaces, upgrades Spring to 6.x and Hibernate to 6.x, and uses @PostMapping instead of @RequestMapping with RequestMethod. However, it lacks Java 21-specific idioms (records, pattern matching, etc.) and removes the JUnit dependency without adding a replacement (e.g., JUnit 5), which may break tests.
